name: RPlog_Lessons_Learned_-_Part_3
title: Lessons Learned: Custody
summary: As the starport standoff winds down, the ESPO Gren Delede quietly warns the Falleen Malif to keep his Nova Syndicate origins secret while Colonel Twila Virda braces to interrogate the captured droid. Commander Wolf orders his stormtroopers, Sal Estos and Telos, to march the Imperial Ensign Oren Balak off to the local garrison, brushing aside the CorSec officer Auo's demands for proper identification. Auo, outmatched and unwilling to escalate, formally remands the prisoner and records the handover before walking away in frustration. Twila orders Cubitt's ship impounded with fees waived, and Balak is led off under guard, the incident closing with the Empire asserting its authority over the CorSec officers.
